workspace.title: Facebook Downloads
workspace.subtitle: Public Facebook video pages only; no cookies, private posts, or signed-in content.
workspace.placeholder: One watch, reel, videos, or fb.watch URL per line
workspace.initial_preview: Enter a public Facebook video URL to read its title and thumbnail.
workspace.wrong_site: This workspace accepts supported public Facebook video URLs only.

facebook.name: Facebook Download
facebook.purpose: Read public video metadata and thumbnails and route downloads to Facebook
facebook.control_location: Enable in MOD Manager to show the Facebook download workspace
